description.zh: 辽朝由契丹族耶律阿保机建立，首创南北面官双轨行政制度。北面官以契丹旧制治理游牧民族事务，南面官以汉制治理汉地农耕事务。因俗而治、灵活务实，是中国历史上民族融合治理的典范。
description.en: Founded by Yelü Abaoji of the Khitan people, the Liao Dynasty pioneered a dual administration system. Northern officials governed nomadic affairs using Khitan traditions, while Southern officials administered settled Han regions using Chinese bureaucratic methods. This pragmatic 'govern according to customs' approach became a model for multi-ethnic governance.
